fixed_source:
m=langdetect;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=main():$i64{let go=mut.0;let js=mut.0;let py=mut.0;let docker=mut.false;let total=mut.0;let line=mut.io.readln();lp(s.len(line)>0){let l=s.trim(line);if(s.len(l)>0){total=total+1;if(s.contains(l;".go")){go=go+1}el{if(s.contains(l;".json")){js=js+1}el{if(s.contains(l;".js")){js=js+1}el{if(s.contains(l;".py")){py=py+1}el{if(s.contains(l;"requirements.txt")){py=py+1}el{if(s.contains(l;"Dockerfile")){docker=true}}}}}}};line=io.readln()};let out=mut."";out=s.concat(out;"Technology Stack Report

Languages:
");if(go>0){out=s.concat(out;"  Go: ");out=s.concat(out;s.fromint(go));out=s.concat(out;" file
")};if(js>0){out=s.concat(out;"  JavaScript: ");out=s.concat(out;s.fromint(js));out=s.concat(out;" file
")};if(py>0){out=s.concat(out;"  Python: ");out=s.concat(out;s.fromint(py));out=s.concat(out;" file
")};out=s.concat(out;"
Infrastructure:
");if(docker){out=s.concat(out;"  Docker: yes
")}el{out=s.concat(out;"  Docker: no
")};out=s.concat(out;"
Total files analysed: ");out=s.concat(out;s.fromint(total));io.println(out);<0}
